name: Counter
descriptionTemplate: When the commanding force is attacked and receives damage, the enemy also takes X% of that damage.(Each attack only takes effect once)

progression.renderedDesc: When the commanding force is attacked and receives damage, the enemy also takes 5% of that damage.(Each attack only takes effect once)
progression.renderedDescFr: When the commanding force is attacked and receives dégâts, the ennemi also takes 5% of that dégâts.(Each attaque only takes effect once)

progression.renderedDesc: When the commanding force is attacked and receives damage, the enemy also takes 10% of that damage.(Each attack only takes effect once)
progression.renderedDescFr: When the commanding force is attacked and receives dégâts, the ennemi also takes 10% of that dégâts.(Each attaque only takes effect once)

progression.renderedDesc: When the commanding force is attacked and receives damage, the enemy also takes 15% of that damage.(Each attack only takes effect once)
progression.renderedDescFr: When the commanding force is attacked and receives dégâts, the ennemi also takes 15% of that dégâts.(Each attaque only takes effect once)

progression.renderedDesc: When the commanding force is attacked and receives damage, the enemy also takes 20% of that damage.(Each attack only takes effect once)
progression.renderedDescFr: When the commanding force is attacked and receives dégâts, the ennemi also takes 20% of that dégâts.(Each attaque only takes effect once)

progression.renderedDesc: When the commanding force is attacked and receives damage, the enemy also takes 25% of that damage.(Each attack only takes effect once)
progression.renderedDescFr: When the commanding force is attacked and receives dégâts, the ennemi also takes 25% of that dégâts.(Each attaque only takes effect once)

descriptionTemplateFr: When the commanding force is attacked and receives dégâts, the ennemi also takes X% of that dégâts.(Each attaque only takes effect once)
longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Counter » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « When the commanding force is attacked and receives dégâts, the ennemi also takes 25% of that dégâts.(Each attaque only takes effect once) ». Signature propre à un général : son niveau maximum conditionne la valorisation de la carte.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Counter" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "When the commanding force is attacked and receives damage, the enemy also takes 25% of that damage.(Each attack only takes effect once)". A general-specific signature: its max level drives the card's overall value.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Counter“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „When the commanding force is attacked and receives damage, the enemy also takes 25% of that damage.(Each attack only takes effect once)“. Eine generalspezifische Signatur: Ihr Maximallevel bestimmt den Gesamtwert der Karte.
